sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88118" key="procenhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προξεν-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n88118.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for a broker,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ π.</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">brokerage,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.1</biblScope> </bibl> tit. (pl., as Lat. word).</sense> </entryFree>
